headline: Qualcomm launches AI data center CPU, lands Meta
detail: Qualcomm entering the AI data center CPU space with Meta as anchor customer signals intensifying competition in a market AVGO and NVDA have dominated. This could pressure AVGO's AI networking and custom chip narrative near-term. Worth watching whether it lifts SMH broadly or just rotates money within chips.

headline: Cerebras CEO walks back margin forecast after stock plummets
detail: Cerebras stumbling on earnings guidance after an AI infrastructure hype cycle is a warning shot for the whole AI silicon space. Markets hate guidance confusion and it can trigger guilt-by-association selling in AI chip names like AVGO and CRWD's underlying spend thesis. Your chip-heavy book is directly in the blast radius if sentiment sours further.

headline: Nvidia's Huang dismisses black-market data center chips
detail: Huang calling smuggled-chip data centers a dead end is a confidence signal for legitimate AI infrastructure demand, which underpins AVGO, SMH, and the AI spending story behind PLTR and CRWD. Not a market mover alone, but reinforces the long-term demand case for your core names.

headline: Bitcoin drops below $60K, lowest since October 2024
detail: Bitcoin weakness reflects broader risk appetite deterioration and often leads speculative tech names lower with it. PLTR in particular trades with a high-risk-asset correlation and this kind of sentiment shift adds pressure on top of its existing 13% loss in your book.
